title: Cobblemon Ride Effects
description: adds minecraft effects to cobblemon mounts in 1.7+
body:
## Cobblemon Ride Effects

Cobblemon Ride Effects adds **potion effects while riding Pokémon** in Cobblemon.

### What it does
- Riding **Water-type Pokémon** grants **Water Breathing**
- Riding **Fire-type Pokémon** grants **Fire Resistance**
- Effects are active only while mounted and are removed when dismounting

### Configurable
All effects are configurable through the config file `cobblemonrideeffects.json`.

You can:
- Change what **types** give which effects
- Assign effects to **specific Pokémon species**
- hide the effects icon from showing in top right corner

**Example:**  
- **Sharpedo** is configured by default to give **Water Breathing** and **Conduit Power**, as shown in the default config when it is generated

Because effects are based on Pokémon **types**, the mod automatically works with **fakemon addons and custom Pokémon**, as long as they are mountable.
